regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Hamilton typically charge $85–$120/hr. Waikato rates are generally 10% lower than Auckland. Emergency callouts add $70–$130.

businesses.name: On Tap Plumbing Ltd
businesses.known_for: Professional, punctual plumbing: renovations, new builds, drainage, hot water heating and wood fire installations; Master Plumbers member.

businesses.name: Ur Plumber
businesses.known_for: Over 15 years experience in residential, commercial and industrial plumbing, gasfitting, kitchen and bathroom upgrades across the Waikato.

businesses.name: Farrell Plumbing Ltd
businesses.known_for: Hot water cylinder replacement, gas infinity conversions, gas heating and wood burners for Hamilton and wider Waikato.
